posts.author: lou.es (Lou)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I would like to know which version of the monday software I am using. In addition, I would like to be aware of the new changes in the updates of the software. This is crucial to me to ensure that my team can do the proper validation to use this within our entreprise.

Thanks a lot!
